_definitions.description: Enigma Beast field and beast data from Top War (Server 2864). 5 fields with deployed beasts, field attribute bonuses, and buff ID mappings.
_definitions.beastTypeNotes: Beast names change at 5 stars (e.g., Gleamdeer -> Lumideer). The type name is the base/pre-evolution name as shown in the beast list.

fields.cfgId: Beast species config ID. Pattern: (type * 5) + offset. Quality 5 beasts have cfgId multiples of 5, quality 4 have cfgId ending in 4 or 9.
fields.level: Current level (max depends on quality: 100 for Gold, 80 for Purple)
fields.star: Star level (1-5). Names change at 5 stars.
fields.potential: Current potential value. Stats scale as potential / maxPotential.
fields.potentialRange: Min|Max potential for this species (e.g., 11200|16000 for Gold, 6400|8000 for Purple)
fields.mainBuff: Primary buff ID (520xxx). One per beast, enhanced by star upgrades.
fields.baseBuff: Array of 3 random buff IDs (520xxx). Scaled by potential.
fields.holeLevel: Enhancement level of the deployment slot (not the beast itself)
fields.mainBuffResolved: Resolved main buff with display name and computed value
fields.baseBuffsResolved: Array of 3 resolved base buffs with display names and computed values

buffIdSystem.description: Buff IDs follow 520xxx pattern. Last digit = branch (0=All, 1=Army, 2=Navy, 3=Air). Middle digits = category. Values are potential-scaled percentages, except 520000 (March Size) which is additive.

mainBuffs.520040: Attack of all units (on the offensive)
mainBuffs.520043: Air Force units Attack (on the offensive)
mainBuffs.520050: HP Boost of all units (on the offensive)
mainBuffs.520051: Army units HP Boost (on the offensive)
mainBuffs.520052: Naval units HP Boost (on the offensive)
mainBuffs.520053: Air Force units HP Boost (on the offensive)
mainBuffs.520060: Attack of all units (on the defensive)
mainBuffs.520063: Air Force units Attack (on the defensive)
mainBuffs.520070: HP Boost of all units (on the defensive)
mainBuffs.520071: Army units HP Boost (on the defensive)
mainBuffs.520072: Naval units HP Boost (on the defensive)
mainBuffs.520073: Air Force units HP Boost (on the defensive)

baseBuffs.520120: All units HP Boost (on the offensive)
baseBuffs.520123: Air Force HP Boost (on the offensive)
baseBuffs.520140: All units HP Boost (on the defensive)
baseBuffs.520143: Air Force HP Boost (on the defensive)

buffIdSystem.confirmed: 520000, 520010, 520013, 520020, 520021, 520033, 520072, 520100, 520103, 520111, 520112, 520113, 520120, 520121, 520122 confirmed from beast detail popups. 520101, 520102 confirmed by user game knowledge. Rest derived by consistent last-digit=branch pattern.

fieldAttributeSlots.description: Each field has attribute bonus slots activated by deployment conditions. Buffs include mastery boosts, formation boosts, equipment engine boosts, Titan Gear base/random attribute boosts. Some slots reference the 70% gear refinement threshold from Titan Gear data.
conditionTypes: Deploy N beasts of 2+ stars at Legendary
Deploy N beasts of 3+ stars at Legendary

buffValueFormula.description: Buff values computed from beast config data. All values scale with potential/16000 (universal max, regardless of beast quality).
buffValueFormula.marchSize: 520000 (March Size) is additive integer, not percentage
